name: Expansion Base Building
description: Territory system with modular constructions, codelocks, safes, and configurable raiding and basebuilding settings.
overview:
Expansion Base Building introduces new basebuilding constructions and a territory system.

## Key Features

- **Territory System** — Build and claim your territory with friends to protect your base from raiders
- **Territory Flags** — Tons of new territory flag designs
- **Codelocks** — Secure your base with combination locks
- **Modular Constructions** — Walls, floors, ramps, and stairs that snap together
- **Safes** — Secure storage containers
- **Raiding Settings** — Full control over raid mechanics
- **Building Settings** — Configure what can be built and where
- **Territory Settings** — Manage territory size, limits, and permissions
- **Build Anywhere** — Option to allow construction outside territories

### Integration with Other Mods

- Combined with **Community Online Tools (COT)**: Admin menu to manage all territories on your server
- Combined with **Expansion Licensed**: Arma 2 props added as deployables (barbwire, signs, tents, gunrack, etc.)
- Combined with **Expansion Spawn Selection**: Ability to respawn on your territory
- Combined with **CodeLock Bridge**: Expansion Codelock compatible with multiple mods using the CodeLock mod
installation: Add to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Configure building parameters and raid settings.
Set territory and building limits as needed.

troubleshooting.solution: Check territory limits and ensure the player is within their territory radius.
Verify persistence is enabled and the database is correctly configured.

useCases.title: PvE Server (No Raiding)
useCases.description: Set EnableRaiding to 0 for peaceful base building without raid risk.

useCases.title: Hardcore Raiding
useCases.description: Enable all raid tools and reduce structure health for intense PvP raiding.

quickSettings.name: Enabled
quickSettings.description: Enable or disable the base building system.

quickSettings.name: MaxBuildHeight
quickSettings.description: Maximum number of floors a base can be built upward.

quickSettings.name: TerritorySize
quickSettings.description: Radius of the territory flag protection area in meters.

quickSettings.name: MaxTerritoriesPerPlayer
quickSettings.description: Maximum territories a single player can own.

quickSettings.name: DestroyableWithMelee
quickSettings.description: Whether structures can be damaged with melee weapons.

useCases.description: Set EnableRaiding to 0 for peaceful base building without raid risk.

useCases.title: Hardcore Raiding
useCases.description: Enable all raid tools and reduce structure health for intense PvP raiding.

Configure building parameters and raid settings.

useCases.title: Players can't place structures
useCases.description: Check territory limits and ensure the player is within their territory radius.

useCases.title: Bases disappearing after restart
useCases.description: Verify persistence is enabled and the database is correctly configured.
